items.md: Details document changes for software enhancements.
items.value: Details document changes for software enhancements.

items.md: GPS 175, GNC 355/355A, and GNX 375 are the first 2” by 6.25” panel mount navigators to employ full color capacitive touchscreen technology.
items.value: GPS 175, GNC 355/355A, and GNX 375 are the first 2” by 6.25” panel mount navigators to employ full color capacitive touchscreen technology.

items.caption: GNC 355 navigator unit showing dimensions of 2" by 6.25"
items.md: ![GNC 355 navigator unit showing dimensions of 2" by 6.25"](page_18_image_1_v2.jpg)
GPS 175 is a TSO-C146e compliant GPS/WAAS navigator with en route, terminal, and precision/non-precision approach capabilities.
items.value: GPS 175 is a TSO-C146e compliant GPS/WAAS navigator with en route, terminal, and precision/non-precision approach capabilities.

items.md: GNC 355/355A combines the functionality of GPS 175 with a TSO-C169a compliant VHF radio communications transceiver. GNC 355 supports 25 kHz channel spacing, while GNC 355A provides tuning for both 25 kHz and 8.33 khz channels.
items.value: GNC 355/355A combines the functionality of GPS 175 with a TSO-C169a compliant VHF radio communications transceiver. GNC 355 supports 25 kHz channel spacing, while GNC 355A provides tuning for both 25 kHz and 8.33 khz channels.

items.md: Both GPS 175 and GNC 355 can receive ADS-B In weather and traffic when interfaced to either GNX 375, GTX 345, or GDL 88.
items.value: Both GPS 175 and GNC 355 can receive ADS-B In weather and traffic when interfaced to either GNX 375, GTX 345, or GDL 88.

items.md: GNX 375 combines the functionality of GPS 175 with a TSO-C112e (Level 2els, Class 1) compliant mode S transponder that meets ADS-B Out requirements. A dual-link ADS-B In receiver provides the display of traffic and subscription-free weather.
items.value: GNX 375 combines the functionality of GPS 175 with a TSO-C112e (Level 2els, Class 1) compliant mode S transponder that meets ADS-B Out requirements. A dual-link ADS-B In receiver provides the display of traffic and subscription-free weather.

items.md: Each unit is compatible with Bluetooth wireless technology, providing flight plan, traffic, weather, and position data to an available portable electronic device.
items.value: Each unit is compatible with Bluetooth wireless technology, providing flight plan, traffic, weather, and position data to an available portable electronic device.

items.md: Tapping this key once sets the squawk code to the preprogrammed VFR code.
items.value: Tapping this key once sets the squawk code to the preprogrammed VFR code.

items.md: This code is factory set to 1200, but may be changed during configuration.
items.value: This code is factory set to 1200, but may be changed during configuration.

items.caption: XPDR Key diagram showing Active Transponder, Transponder Mode (On), and Active Squawk Code 1200
items.md: ![XPDR Key diagram showing Active Transponder, Transponder Mode (On), and Active Squawk Code 1200](page_80_image_2_v2.jpg)
Tapping the **XPDR** key activates the IDENT function for 18 seconds. This signal distinguishes the transponder from others on the air traffic controller’s screen.
items.value: Tapping the XPDR key activates the IDENT function for 18 seconds. This signal distinguishes the transponder from others on the air traffic controller’s screen.

items.md: Tapping this key when another page is active immediately opens the control panel.
items.value: Tapping this key when another page is active immediately opens the control panel.
